base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of south_island_map — a ui from 1991 sonic the hedgehog. South Island inter-zone map — shows Sonic-token progress across zones. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: South Island inter-zone map — shows Sonic-token progress across zones
